context: Verify that the agent removes all `as` assertions and replaces them with runtime type guards that narrow the type before returning.

checklist.name: No `as` assertions remain in function bodies
checklist.description: The output file contains zero uses of the `as` keyword in function bodies (comments excluded).

checklist.name: Each function throws a descriptive `TypeError` on invalid input
checklist.description: Every parser function has a runtime check that throws a `TypeError` with a message identifying which value was invalid.

checklist.name: Type predicate functions are used for object-shape validation
checklist.description: At least one `is*` type predicate function (with the `value is T` return type annotation) is defined and used to validate object shapes.

checklist.name: TypeScript narrows to the correct type after guard
checklist.description: After each runtime check, TypeScript's control-flow analysis narrows the type so the function returns the correct type without further assertions.

checklist.name: No new `any` or `@ts-ignore` introduced
checklist.description: The rewritten file introduces no `any` annotations, `@ts-ignore`, or `// @ts-nocheck` directives.
